summary: One of the best deals this ongoing Prime Day has been on Apple’s latest flagship headphones. title: Prime Day is offering rare discounts on Philips Hue smart lights
summary: Philips Hue products don’t often see major discounts, which makes this year’s Prime Day deals especially notable. title: With GTA looming, consoles are getting expensive at the worst possible time
summary: The release of Grand Theft Auto VI is a singular moment, the kind of massive cultural phenomenon that makes people want to go out and buy a console to play it. title: Samsung will soon start charging to access its smart home API
summary: From October this year Samsung will roll out a variety of new paid tiers for access to its SmartThings API, including a $4.99 monthly plan for "non-commercial, individual developers." title: Apple’s most powerful Macs might be waiting until 2027 for big processor upgrades
summary: Apple is expected to shake up its usual Mac silicon release strategy, with Bloomberg's Mark Gurman reporting that there won't be Pro or Max versions of the upcoming M6 chip. title: Android 17’s new foldable gaming mode could make flippy phones more fun
summary: Android 17 is getting a dedicated gaming mode for foldables that will put a virtual gamepad with touch controls on half of your screen to theoretically make it easier to play games. title: YouTube updates Shorts to make it even more like TikTok
summary: YouTube is adding even more TikTok-like features to Shorts, including a new "clear screen" mode that removes the icons and text from the video you're watching.
